title: Parry Mod
description: A mod that allows parrying using swords.
body:
This mod allows you to block incoming damage with parrying!

Right click while holding a sword to parry. If you get hit in the time window of parrying, you negate incoming damage, a visual particles effect appears, and a high-pitched anvil sound plays. Using parry causes a cooldown for the ability.

The mod is in its early state, but I'm planning on adding the following:
- Configurable cooldown and time window
- (maybe) Multiple versions support
- (maybe) Forge support

![An example of successfull parry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/llRl4Spf/images/ea18a3ab63676c1f0be8d3ad469356db99a03e23.gif)
